# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-deployment
  labels:
    app: {{ .Release.Name }}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Release.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
          image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1001
            runAsGroup: 3001
            fsGroup: 2001
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{ .Values.image.pullSecret }}
